name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on your back on a bench.
Grip the barbell with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower the bar to your mid-chest.
Push the bar back up until your arms are fully extended.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Set the bench to a 30-45 degree incline.
Grip the bar and lower it to your upper chest.
Press the bar back up until arms are locked.

name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Place the bar across your upper back (traps).
Keep your chest up and core tight.
Lower your hips until they are below your knees.
Drive back up to the starting position.

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, bar over mid-foot.
Bend at the hips and knees to grip the bar.
Keep your back flat and pull the bar up by extending hips and knees.
Stand tall at the top, then lower the bar under control.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Grip the bar with palms facing away, slightly wider than shoulders.
Hang with arms fully extended.
Pull yourself up until your chin is over the bar.
Lower yourself back to the starting position.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge at the hips with a slight knee bend.
Grip the bar and pull it toward your lower ribs.
Squeeze your shoulder blades at the top.
Lower the bar back to arms' length.

name: Standing Overhead Press
instructions: Clean the bar to your shoulders or take it from a rack.
Press the bar overhead until arms are locked.
Keep your core tight and avoid leaning back.
Lower the bar back to your shoulders.

name: Weighted Dip
instructions: Support yourself on parallel bars with arms extended.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until they are at 90 degrees.
Push back up to the starting position.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold the bar at hip level.
Hinge at the hips, keeping the bar close to your legs.
Lower until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.
Return to the starting position by extending your hips.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Place one foot on a bench behind you.
Hold dumbbells at your sides.
Lower your hips until your front thigh is parallel to the ground.
Drive back up through your front heel.
